mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO kb_document_chunk ( id, document_id, knowledge_base_id, chunk_index, content, summary, token_count, vector_status, embedding_ref, page_no, section_title, char_count, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, deleted_by ) VALUES
( #{chunk.id}, #{chunk.documentId}, #{chunk.knowledgeBaseId}, #{chunk.chunkIndex}, #{chunk.content}, #{chunk.summary}, #{chunk.tokenCount}, #{chunk.vectorStatus}, #{chunk.embeddingRef}, #{chunk.pageNo}, #{chunk.sectionTitle}, #{chunk.charCount}, #{chunk.createdAt}, #{chunk.updatedAt}, #{chunk.deletedAt}, #{chunk.deletedBy} )
